title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Nami, Hiyori, Yamato, Kozuki Alliance, Beast Pirates as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't celebrate like this is special Tama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: by the time we leave this country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it'll be a place where you can eat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...As much as you want, every single day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I met powerful and passionate friends on my voyage...

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: ...and together, our Ninja- Pirate-think- Samurai Alliance...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Kaido, Crochi, and the Beast Pirates...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The monsters that have kept you living in fear...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will never forget the heroes who paved the way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm not sure what to say next...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you, momo, just a figure- head?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does anything in the world still seem scary to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name was given to me by my father!! It means second to none!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I swear to live up to that by restoring this country's barren lands to the paradise they once were!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'll need you to lend me your strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have transcended the last 20 years to save this land!! From this moment on...

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
